artifacts.name: export-import-unit-tests
artifacts.description: Unit tests for exportModelJSON and importModelJSON functions covering T-FE-SHARE-001-01, T-FE-SHARE-001-02, T-FE-SHARE-001-03

summary.work_completed: Wrote failing unit tests for FR-SHARE-001 (JSON export/import).
key_findings: Export service uses Blob and anchor click to trigger download.
Import service validates JSON structure and sanitizes fields.
Error handling is in place for invalid JSON.

human_review_required.item: PR review for test quality and completeness

recommended_actions: Implement the export/import functionality to satisfy the tests.
Ensure ActionBar buttons trigger the service correctly.
Add any missing edge case handling as indicated by tests.
